requested_amendments_to_carers_register.other_information_current_information: Primary carer approved for two children aged 5–12; occupation recorded as "part-time retail assistant"; preferred contact phone listed as (555) 219-3044; preferred language listed as English only.
requested_amendments_to_carers_register.other_information_requested_amendment: Request update to occupation and contact details. Best contact number during business hours is still my mobile, but please update to (555) 734-9821. I also speak basic conversational Spanish, which is sometimes helpful when supporting children from Spanish-speaking backgrounds, so please add Spanish as a secondary language. No change to approval category (still primary carer for two children aged 5–12). No change to marital status (married) or household composition (myself, spouse Daniel O'Connor, and our two biological children, ages 9 and 11).
